hero.title:
Construction Management Software 
  Built for Real-World Results
hero.description: Trusted by builders, teams, and project leaders for complete project control.

trustedLogos.title: Today, BuilderTek is dominating in the construction Landscape with:

platformSection.title: BuilderTek: Built for Construction
platformSection.description: A platform created to eliminate silos and streamline project workflows across the construction lifecycle.

features.title: BuilderTek began as a passion project of our Founder & CEO in a small one-room apartment with a clear objective: to solve real-world construction challenges with a connected, real-time platform. What began as a focused initiative to streamline day-to-day construction workflows has evolved over more than two decades into one of the leading construction management platforms in the United States.
features.description: Since its inception in 2005, BuilderTek has addressed fragmented processes by connecting field and office teams, centralizing communication, and maintaining structured transaction records between project managers, vendors, and stakeholders. The platform was built to replace disconnected systems with one unified environment designed specifically for construction.

features.title: As BuilderTek expanded across projects nationwide, its quality, reliability, and architectural strength gained industry recognition. This foundation led to an early partnership with Salesforce, establishing BuilderTek as a trusted ISV partner.
features.description: For over 15 years, BuilderTek has remained a leading construction platform, supporting businesses of all sizes with performance, transparency, and scalable growth.

industriesSection.title: A Powerful Asset For Modern Construction Teams
industriesSection.description: From large-scale commercial developments to routine renovation projects, BuilderTek serves as a strategic asset for construction teams of every size.

tabs.name: Commercial Contractors
tabs.title: Manage Complex, Large-Scale Projects
tabs.subtitle: with precision and complete cost control.

financialControl.title:
Proven at Scale;
 Trusted by Thousands Worldwide
financialControl.description:
An Exclusive Salesforce Partnership: Reinforcing deep integration and platform reliability.

Preferred by Government & NGO Projects: BuilderTek’s robust, auditable workflows made it a recognized software partner for government, nonprofit, and public-sector construction programs.

This combination of depth and scale reflects real-world confidence from teams that demand clarity, compliance, and control.

financialControl2.title: The Best Construction Platform for All Projects
financialControl2.description:
One system to manage RFQs, scheduling, budgets, CRM, financials, and more, built and optimized for construction workflows.

 BuilderTek stands apart because it:
features: Operates 100% natively for security, scalability, and performance
Provides a unified platform instead of fragmented point solutions
Scales from small builders to enterprise portfolios
Offers audit-ready controls for governance and compliance

Results.title: Built for Results, Designed for Growth
Results.description: We continuously invest in features and integrations that evolve with your business and industry needs.
Results.sub: From mobile field access to executive dashboards, BuilderTek focuses on efficiency, usability, and transparency, helping construction teams stay ahead without complexity.

section.title: Ready to Transform
section.description: Discover how BuilderTek can bring clarity, control, and connected workflows to your construction projects.
